name: Rhubarb-Hickory Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the rhubarb steep in 1/2 cup of the sugar for up to 24 hours, stirring occasionally.
2. Mix together the remaining sugar and all dry ingredients.
3. Beat the egg lightly and stir into it with 1/4 cup of the rhubarb juice, milk, and melted butter.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients, stirring just until mixed.
5. Fold in the rhubarb (if there is still more juice) and hickory nuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1 hour.
8. Allow the loaf to rest in the pan for 10 minutes before unmolding, then cool on a rack.
Makes one 8-inch loaf.
